changeSet.author: nour
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notifications ( id BIGINT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, job_id BIGINT NOT NULL, user_id BIGINT NOT NULL, title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, body TEXT NOT NULL, image_url VARCHAR(1024), data JSONB, is_read BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, read_at TIMESTAMPTZ, push_status VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING', attempt_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, last_attempt_at TIMESTAMPTZ, next_retry_at TIMESTAMPTZ, is_deleted BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ, deleted_by VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), created_by VARCHAR(255), updated_by VARCHAR(255) );
COMMENT ON TABLE notifications IS 'Per-user notification center — one row per (job, user) pair'; COMMENT ON COLUMN notifications.push_status IS 'PENDING | SENT | FAILED | SKIPPED'; COMMENT ON COLUMN notifications.attempt_count IS 'Total FCM delivery attempts made (incremented on each try)'; COMMENT ON COLUMN notifications.next_retry_at IS 'Earliest time the retry worker may re-attempt this notification';
